title: Fire Fighters Puzzle, 45 Pieces, 40 x 30cm, Children's Jigsaw, Ages 3+, Rescue Theme
features: EDUCATIONAL PUZZLE: Fire Fighters Puzzle features a vibrant rescue scene with firefighters, trucks, and helicopters, perfect for developing problem-solving skills in young children
AGE APPROPRIATE: Specially designed for children aged 3 years and above, with 45 large pieces that are easy for small hands to manipulate
GENEROUS SIZE: Completed puzzle measures 40 x 30cm, providing an engaging activity that helps develop fine motor skills and hand-eye coordination
EXCITING THEME: Fire rescue-themed illustration captures children's imagination while teaching them about emergency services and community helpers
QUALITY CONSTRUCTION: Durable puzzle pieces are made from sturdy materials that withstand repeated use, making this an excellent gift for preschoolers and young children
description: Product description Ignite your child's imagination with the Fire Fighters Puzzle! This exciting 45-piece jigsaw features a vibrant rescue scene complete with fire engines, helicopters, and brave firefighters in action. Measuring 40 x 30cm when completed, it's perfectly sized for little hands to manipulate while providing an engaging challenge. Designed specifically for children aged 3 and above, this puzzle helps develop essential cognitive skills including problem-solving, hand-eye coordination, and spatial awareness. The colourful firefighting theme captivates young minds while they learn about community helpers and emergency services. Made with durable materials for long-lasting play, this puzzle makes an excellent gift for birthdays, holidays, or any occasion. Watch as your little one experiences the satisfaction of completing their very own rescue scene! A wonderful addition to any child's puzzle collection that combines fun with learning. Safety Warning Not suitable kids under 18 Months
